mapper.sql: select distinct r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.menu_check_strictly, r.dept_check_strictly, r.status, r.del_flag, r.create_time, r.remark FROM sys_user u left JOIN sys_role_post srp on srp.post_id = u.primary_post_id left JOIN sys_role r on r.role_id = srp.role_id
mapper.select: select * from sys_role where role_key = #{roleKey} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = '0'

select distinct r.role_id FROM sys_user u left JOIN sys_role_post srp on srp.post_id = u.primary_post_id left JOIN sys_role r on r.role_id = srp.role_id left JOIN sys_dept sd ON sd.dept_id = sr.dept_id WHERE r.del_flag = '0' and u.user_id = #{userId}

select distinct r.* FROM sys_user u join sys_user_post sup on sup.user_id = u.user_id join sys_role_post srp on srp.post_id = sup.post_id join sys_role r on r.role_id = srp.role_id WHERE r.del_flag = '0' and u.user_id = #{userId}
select distinct r.* FROM sys_user u join sys_user_role sur on sur.user_id = u.user_id join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id WHERE r.del_flag = '0' and u.user_id = #{userId}
select distinct sr.role_name as label, sr.role_id as value from sys_role sr where sr.status = '0' and sr.del_flag = '0'
